stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Based on the Flight Mode Annunciator (FMA) and Flight Director indications shown on the PFD, what is the required control input to follow the Flight Director demand, and which flight modes are currently engaged?

options.a: The Flight Director is commanding a pitch-up; engaged modes are HDG and ALT.
options.b: The Flight Director is commanding a descent; engaged modes are OP DES and NAV.
options.c: The Flight Director is commanding a turn to intercept the localizer; engaged modes are LOC and G/S.
options.d: The Flight Director is commanding a pitch down; engaged modes are LOC and ALT.
